---
title: Publications
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-shell page-shell-inner">
  <section class="section reveal">
    <div class="section-heading">
      <p class="eyebrow">Selected Publications</p>
      <h2>Recent industry work and selected first-author papers</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="section-heading">
      <p class="eyebrow">Recent Industry Publication</p>
      <h2>Tempus-era work</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="publication-list">
      <article class="publication-card">
        <h3>
          Dynamic Changes in Circulating Tumor Fraction as a Predictor of Real-World Clinical
          Outcomes in Solid Tumor Malignancy Patients Treated with Immunotherapy
        </h3>
        <p>Targeted Oncology, 2024</p>
        <a href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39037536/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">
          View on PubMed
        </a>
      </article>
      <article class="publication-card">
        <h3>Additional manuscripts currently under review</h3>
        <p>Recent Tempus-era collaborative work in real-world genomic oncology</p>
        <p>
          Several additional manuscripts from my time at Tempus AI are currently under review and
          will be added here as they become publicly available.
        </p>
      </article>
    </div>
    <div class="section-heading publication-subhead">
      <p class="eyebrow">Selected First-Author Work</p>
      <h2>Papers that best reflect my independent research profile</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="publication-list">
      <article class="publication-card">
        <h3>Association between WWOX/MAF variants and dementia-related neuropathologic endophenotypes</h3>
        <p>Neurobiology of Aging, 2022</p>
        <a href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34852950/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">View on PubMed</a>
      </article>
      <article class="publication-card">
        <h3>Analysis of genes implicated in risk for LATE-NC and hippocampal sclerosis</h3>
        <p>Acta Neuropathologica Communications, 2021</p>
        <a href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34526147/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">View on PubMed</a>
      </article>
    </div>
    <div class="section-heading publication-subhead">
      <p class="eyebrow">Selected Collaborative Work</p>
      <h2>Examples that show breadth across clinical and translational domains</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="publication-list">
      <article class="publication-card">
        <h3>Improved survival following transarterial radioembolization of infiltrative-appearance hepatocellular carcinoma</h3>
        <p>Abdominal Radiology, 2021</p>
        <a href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33385248/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">View on PubMed</a>
      </article>
      <article class="publication-card">
        <h3>Validation of the modified Bosniak classification system to risk stratify pediatric cystic renal masses</h3>
        <p>Journal of Pediatric Urology, 2022</p>
        <a href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34961708/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">View on PubMed</a>
      </article>
      <article class="publication-card">
        <h3>Stratification by obesity class, rather than age, can identify a higher percent of children at risk for non-alcoholic fatty liver disease and metabolic dysfunction</h3>
        <p>Pediatric Obesity, 2022</p>
        <a href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34662928/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">View on PubMed</a>
      </article>
    </div>
    <p class="supporting-link">
      For a fuller list of papers and citation counts, visit
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=WxaYEwoAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">
        my Google Scholar profile
      </a>.
    </p>
  </section>
</div>
```
